border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="tOlvd6xsDWIf71crsUUw"> <mxGraphModel dx="9597" dy="8292" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" value="" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-6280" y="-4682.5" width="1020" height="562.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>Stripe Overwhelmed</b></font><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">Transactions: 2s --&gt; 8-10s</font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=8;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-6251.44" y="-4495" width="260" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" value="<div style="text-align: left;"><b style="font-size: 16px; font-family: Verdana; background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">Old Way:</b></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">1) Payment Fails</span></font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">2) Order Cancelled</span></font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">3) Customer Loses Cart</span></font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=5;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-5864.120000000001" y="-4655" width="236.67" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" value="<div style="text-align: left;"><b style="font-size: 16px; font-family: Verdana; background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">Temporal Way:</b></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Automatic Retry Policies</span></font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=5;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-5861.410000000001" y="-4385" width="221.67" height="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;"><b>Retry with&nbsp;</b></span></font><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;"><b>Exponential Backoff</b></span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Attempt 1: wait 2s</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Attempt 2: wait 4s</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Attempt 3: wait 8s</span></font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=5;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-5858.070000000001" y="-4260" width="215" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;"><b>Success on 2nd-3rd Attempt</b></span></font><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Customer gets order confirmation</span></font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=5;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-5496" y="-4250.63" width="208.5" height="101.25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" value="<b><font style="font-size: 20px;" face="Verdana">Payment Processing Issue</font></b>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-6262.5" y="-4670" width="300" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" value="" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=0;" edge="1" source="3" target="4" parent="1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="-5850" y="-4430" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="-5800" y="-4480" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" value="" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;"
